title: meibomia oldhamii
intro: Meibomia oldhamii, also known as Butterfly Pea, is a climbing plant native to the tropical regions of Asia and Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Meibomia oldhamii include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting cardiovascular health. Meibomia oldhamii can be consumed as a herbal tea, added to smoothies or salads, or used as a natural dye, and it is also available in supplement form.
